name: Tex Mex Turkey Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat; cook onion and garlic for 3 minutes or until softened.
2. Stir in chili powder, cumin, oregano, salt, hot pepper flakes, and pepper; cook for 1 minute.
3. Add tomatoes; crush with potato masher.
4. Bring to boil; reduce heat and simmer for 20-30 minutes or until most of the liquid has evaporated.
5. In a bowl, combine corn, sweet pepper, and parsley.
6. Place one-third of tortilla chips in a greased 8-inch square baking dish (2 liters).
7. Top with half the turkey, corn mixture, and tomato sauce, and 1/2 cup of the cheese.
8. Repeat layers of tortilla chips, turkey, corn mixture, tomato sauce, and remaining cheese.
9. Crush remaining tortilla chips; set aside.
10. Bake, uncovered, in a 350°F (180°C) oven for 20 minutes.
11. Uncover and sprinkle with remaining chips.
12. Bake for 10 minutes longer or until heated through.
